summary: Made one surgical exit-line adjustment to clarify that Lena does not treat the missed date with Eli as final, tightening the handoff into chapter 7 without changing chapter beats or register. The opening already carried cleanly from chapter 5 and did not duplicate the neighboring opening scaffold, so it was left intact.
edits: Clarified the final paragraph so Lena's internal choice after Eli's note points more directly toward the rescheduled connection that opens chapter 7.
